since_last: 73% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -0.83% · Gold +1.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 73% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.07%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.07%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +3.91%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +3.91%, TER +3.78%, ASML +3.48%, ORCL +3.40%, KLAC +3.25%. Laggards: TLN -2.46%, HON -1.90%, DDOG -1.72%, AAPL -1.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.61% at $163.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
